steps.title: Set up the equation
steps.content:
Let $x$ be the number of 5-pound boxes. The total weight is the sum of weights from both types of boxes:
$$5x + 10(13) = 220$$

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content:
Simplify and isolate $x$:
$$5x + 130 = 220$$
$$5x = 90$$
$$x = 18$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
